subcodes.first_line: O My loved ones in the lands! This Wronged One had a brother whom He took under [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیائی فی البلاد این مظلوم برادری داشته او را تحت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for forgiveness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
